name: Honey Glazed Ham
recipeIngredient: Ginger ale may also be used
recipeInstructions:
1. Place ham and soda into crock pot. If your pot has a rack, you can use it.
2. Cover and cook on low for 6 to 8 hours (high for 3 to 4 hours).
3. Thirty minutes before serving, combine remaining ingredients, including 3 tablespoons drippings from the bottom of the crock pot.
4. Spread glaze over ham and continue heating. Let ham stand for 15 minutes before serving.
